description:
Rewire AOT scheduler hooks (aot_spawn_hook, aot_send_hook) to use the new cps-in-clif spawn/receive model — fz_spawn_entry dispatch for spawned closures, parked_cont + fz_resume_park for receive resumption.

The eager-sync model has to either survive the new shim shape (each child task runs through fz_spawn_entry instead of the old stub-based dispatch) or grow into a real run_quantum-style scheduler. Pick whichever fits AOT's no-libdispatch constraints.

Touch:
- runtime/src/aot_shim.rs: spawn_hook calls fz_spawn_entry against the child's closure ptr (SystemV→Tail-CC). The child runs synchronously to halt or park. On park (parked_cont set + mailbox empty), abort or run a scheduler loop that pumps tasks from AOT_TASKS until all halt.

Acceptance: §8.4 concurrency_ping_pong passes on AOT path.
title: fz-cps.6.2: AOT concurrency hooks for cps-in-clif
